observation.images.exterior_image.comment: DROID exterior camera (over_shoulder_left); third-person scene view, first by camera-order convention (the policy's primary/exterior slot). Native 720x1280, aspect-preserving downscaled by the bridge (long edge capped at 640, NO square squash) so the policy's resize_with_pad to 224 stays distortion-free. Shape is advisory (the agent reads the real array shape).

observation.images.wrist_image.comment: DROID wrist camera (Robotiq base_link/wrist_cam, focal 2.8 — calibrated to pi05/DreamZero). Native 720x1280, aspect-preserving downscaled (long edge capped at 640, NO square squash); the policy resize_with_pads to 224.

observation.text.comment: Task instruction. RoboLab tasks define default/vague/specific variants; the variant is chosen per episode (instruction_type) by the harness.

observation.state.arm_joint_pos.comment: Absolute Panda arm joint positions (RoboLab ProprioceptionObservationCfg arm_joint_pos). Elems 0-6 of the env's concatenated 8-dim 'state'.

observation.state.gripper.comment: Gripper opening (RoboLab gripper_pos), 0=open / 1=closed. Elem 7 of the env's 'state'; kept out of JOINT so its token never collides with an arm joint.

action.arm_joint_pos.comment: Absolute Panda joint position targets (RoboLab DroidJointPositionActionCfg). The native DROID action; pairs with the DROID pi0.5 joint-position policy (openpi pi05_droid_jointpos / lerobot DAVIAN-Robotics/pi05_droid_jointpos).

action.gripper.comment: Binary gripper: >0.5 closes (finger_joint -> pi/4), else opens (-> 0). ABSOLUTE (arm is absolute too). state_representation NORM01 with a binary threshold at runtime.

comment: RoboLab (NVIDIA Isaac Lab, backend=isaaclab) DROID env in its native joint-position configuration (envs/robolab/env_server.py --control joint_pos / DroidJointPositionActionCfg): Franka Panda (7-DoF, arm7g1) + Robotiq 2F-85, ~15 Hz (sim dt 1/120, decimation 8). Action is 8-DoF: 7 absolute Panda joint targets + binary gripper; the env's concatenated 8-dim 'state' and action are split into per-quantity features that 'order' reassembles. Two policy cameras (over_shoulder_left exterior + Robotiq wrist), emitted as aspect-preserving uint8 HWC RGB (long edge capped at 640 — NOT square-squashed, unlike the generic 256x256 droid_*.json templates), so the policy's resize_with_pad to 224 is distortion-free. No env-side normalization (limits only); normalization is policy-side. The env exposes a single parametrized task 'robolab' covering all 120 RoboLab benchmark tasks (task_name/seed/instruction_type are variant args). The exact wire artifact this mirrors lives at envs/robolab/robolab.json (raw schema + action_modes). Sibling launch-selectable control modes of the same embodiment: ee_abs (DroidIKActionCfg, absolute differential IK) and ee_del (DroidRelIKActionCfg, relative differential IK), preserved in contracts/experiments/droid.json; the velocity pairing is droid_joint_vel.json.
